localizations.title: In the Clutches of Hades
localizations.hint_0: Did you take cards C, R, 13, and 31?
localizations.hint_1: Offer Apollo the gold olives and he will help you.
localizations.hint_2: Bring these olives back to Apollo.
localizations.hint_3: The islands form a huge trident.
localizations.hint_8: First, you must find a way to get to the middle of the ocean. Then, stay there for a few moments.
localizations.hint_9_first: This winged man could take you into the air. But what about the rules of Unlock!?
localizations.hint_9: Since this man breaks the rules, this gray card could be used as a different color...
localizations.hint_11: Don't be afraid to explore, even if it takes you to the high seas.
localizations.hint_13: Use Alix's construction abilities and help her escape from here.
localizations.hint_14: Large enough to hide in. But where will you go?
localizations.hint_15: Only the gods' vision (the filter) can help you correctly read this inscription.
localizations.hint_17: One never knows. It's always best to have a spare wheel.
localizations.hint_20: Get to the gold olive tree by chariot. The stars will guide you.
localizations.hint_22: This wise man could tell you so much about the sky, if only you had something to show him.
localizations.hint_23: Luckily, the sail is not the only means to propel the boat.
localizations.hint_31: If you found a means to hide among these offerings, you could escape.
localizations.hint_33_first: Aricles gives you the key to overcome the god of the Underworld. You must ally the three gods who helped you and look at the back of the cards.
localizations.hint_33: The assembled Hades constellation will tell you what numbers need changing.
localizations.hint_34: Maybe you should set one head against the other?
localizations.hint_35_first: The eyes of Cerberus shine with anger, a nice harmony is the only way to soothe him.
localizations.hint_35: The lyre notes change according to the way they are played. Find the notes that will soothe each of the creature's heads.
localizations.hint_38: Use the gods' vision (the filter). One single image will reveal the right olives.
localizations.hint_40: There's nothing for it but to find a boat now!
localizations.hint_41: Flap your wings and flee the Underworld.
localizations.hint_45: The barrel is a good place to hide.
localizations.hint_47: Even in the Underworld, everything has a price.
localizations.hint_49: In this world, this coin is worth nothing and will be of no use to you.
localizations.hint_51: This divine lyre will only be useful once Cerberus is in plain view.
localizations.hint_54: In the sky, the stars are sparkling, most likely a sign from the gods.
localizations.hint_60: How can you mute the sirens' song?
localizations.hint_65: The mythological creatures are made of 2 parts. Find what connects them, one by one.
localizations.hint_66: Did you take cards S, T, Y, X, and 47?
localizations.hint_68: Find a way to make a bridge between the two banks.
localizations.hint_70: Something draws your attention on top of the temple, but how can you get up there?
localizations.hint_74: Use the gods' vision (the filter). Sometimes, you must not fear death penalties.
localizations.hint_76: Some sailors sail using the stars, and the shape of the Apollo constellation is familiar to you.
localizations.hint_78: Lightning bolts strike one after the other. You must find the exact sequence.
localizations.hint_81_first: Use the gods' vision (the filter). There is something odd about the chariot wheel.
localizations.hint_81: The broken wheel should be changed.
localizations.hint_82: Gaia is not only a turtle. The stars will also guide you.
localizations.hint_96: Charon speaks in an enigmatic way. Place the STYX cards to recreate the stages of his route.
localizations.hint_98: Only Gaia, the turtle, knows the secrets of this sacred tree. Use the gods' vision (the filter).
localizations.answer_hint_2: Give these gold olives (2) to Apollo (1) as proof of your success.
localizations.answer_hint_3: In machine 63, press the island at the far bottom.
localizations.answer_hint_8: Once at sea, keep your finger pressed on the middle of the screen (machine 63).
localizations.answer_hint_9: By breaking the rules, the winged man (9) can take Alix up to the pediment at the top of the temple (70).
localizations.answer_hint_11: In machine 63, press the sea, half-way between the 3rd island from the top and the Temple (on the continent).
localizations.answer_hint_13: Once you finish the chair, make a barrel to help yourself escape.
localizations.answer_hint_14: Place the barrel (14) among the offerings (31).
localizations.answer_hint_15: Place the filter on this card and you'll see the number 8 appear.
localizations.answer_hint_20: On card 76, you see that the Gaia constellation, which is also the sacred turtle's name, has a sparkling star. The position of that star indicates the +61 red modifier (82). Go there with the chariot (20).
localizations.answer_hint_33: Take cards 3, 8, and 11, and flip them over. Make the constellation of Hades. The numbers form 3=8, thus 33=88.
localizations.answer_hint_34: Use the right-hand side (34) to fight against the left-hand side (34).
localizations.answer_hint_40: Use the paddles (40) in the empty boat to travel to sea.
localizations.answer_hint_41: Take your device in your hand and move it from top to bottom to simulate the flapping of wings.
localizations.answer_hint_45: Alix (13) can now hide in the barrel among the offerings (45) to escape.
localizations.answer_hint_47: Offer the coin (49) to the soul conveyor (47).
localizations.answer_hint_54: The wise man (22) will tell you everything about the constellations (54).
localizations.answer_hint_60: Cut off the sound in the app to silence the sirens. Go to the menu and cut off the Music.
localizations.answer_hint_65: The sequence is: The bull -> the Minotaur (the head and tail of a bull and the body of a man) -> the centaur (the upper body of a human and the lower body and legs of a horse) -> Pegasus (winged horse) -> the griffin (the head and wings of an eagle and the body, tail, and back legs of a lion) -> the lion.
localizations.answer_hint_68: Use your skills to build a plank. Then, place that plank (10) over the rapid (68).
localizations.answer_hint_70: By breaking the rules, the winged man (9) is able to take Alix up to the temple's pediment (70).
localizations.answer_hint_74: Place the filter on this card. It instructs you to press the Penalty button.
localizations.answer_hint_78: Zeus strikes, in order, the 2nd head, the 4th, then simultaneously the 1st and 3rd.
localizations.answer_hint_81: Use machine 90 to make a spare wheel.
localizations.answer_hint_82: On card 76, you see that the Gaia constellation, which is also the sacred turtle's name, has a sparkling star. The position of that star indicates the +61 red modifier (card 82). Go there with the chariot (20).
localizations.answer_hint_96: First, place card S, then X, then T, then superimpose card Y on card T. The Styx then forms 5x7 (=35).
localizations.answer_hint_98: By placing the filter on the turtle, you will see that only one position shows the correct olives (the turtle's head out, and the tree clearly visible on its shell).
localizations.machine_51: The melody calms the monster who falls asleep at your feet.
localizations.machine_65: The sculptures illuminate and seem to animate. A strange figure materializes in front of you.
localizations.machine_78: Zeus strikes the Hydra, which falls to the ground with a muffled noise. Athena appears again.
localizations.machine_98: You take a few sacred olives that seem to shine with divine light.
localizations.machine_63_music: With plugged ears, you manage to escape the call of the sirens. As you approach your destination, the goddess Athena materializes on your ship's deck.
localizations.machine_special_chaise: You finish the chair. Satisfied, the foreman moves away. This is the opportunity for you to find a way to escape.
localizations.penality_button: The door opens onto a path that sinks into the darkness.
localizations.machine_63_step_1: You dock on the beach of Apollo's verdant island and leave the boat on the shore.
localizations.machine_63_step_3: As you approach your destination, a supernatural mist rises above the ocean. A desolate island emerges from it, revealing the gateway to the Underground.
localizations.machine_63_hint_1: The stars have always guided adventurous sailors.
localizations.machine_63_hint_2: Look for the trident among the islands.
localizations.machine_63_hint_3: To find the abode of Hades, travel to the open seas.
localizations.machine_special_no_chaise: "Stop procrastinating, slave! I'm waiting for my chair."
localizations.answer_hint_41_noAccel: To use Icarus’ wings, slide your finger on your device screen from top to bottom and from the bottom up.
localizations.machine_41_end: Alix flies off into the light, saving the two men from the Underworld. Back at the temple, a sumptuous party is organized in honor of the heroine. People will remember for years her wonderful journey, and tell of the challenges she overcame.
localizations.machine_special_instructions: Follow the dotted lines to identify the shape of the object to make.
